# Proof Artifact Paths

Parent: [Gnosis](./README.md)

Generated by `node open-source/gnosis/scripts/audit-ledger-proof-artifact-paths.mjs`.

This report audits the `proofArtifactPath` values emitted by `apps/mcp-superserver/src/ledger-tool-audit.generated.json` so stale MCP links fail as a visible ledger artifact instead of hiding in generated code.
